emails.subject: FW: West Gas 3Q YTD Origination
emails.body: FW: West Gas 3Q YTD Origination Mark, I have reviewed this file and believe it is accurate up to the end of Q3.. Can you please review for your guys and advise if there is any variance.. I am not worried about 10 or 20,000 either way because I don't think we will manage down to that level anyways. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: RE: West Gas 3Q YTD Origination
emails.body: RE: West Gas 3Q YTD Origination Barry it looks reasonable to me. I sure would like to add something sizable to the totals for Q4. But I'm a pig that way! To: Whitt, Mark
